Video.summary: Experience the "frozen tundra fury" of the Freestyle Mania Championship Series as Monster Jam takes over the Resch Center in Green Bay, Wisconsin. Local fan-favorite Mikayla Tulachka in Megalodon looks to defend her home turf against a field of elite competitors, including the "black and green wrecking machine" Weston Anderson in Grave Digger. The intensity reaches a fever pitch in the high-stakes JCB Racing competition, where turn-cone disqualifications and photo finishes determine who advances to the finals. As the engines roar, drivers push their 12,000-pound machines to the absolute limit in a gravity-defying Best Trick contest and a chaotic Freestyle session where anything can happen.
Video.title: Resch Center - Green Bay, WI

Video.summary: Monster Jam's 2000 season continues with freestyle excitement at the Astrodome in Houston, Texas.
Video.title: Astrodome - Houston, TX - Freestyle

Video.summary: Don't miss the racing action from Jacksonville Municipal Stadium on February 28, 2009.
Video.title: Jacksonville Municipal Stadium - Jacksonville, FL - Racing

Image.alt: Jacksonville Municipal Stadium - Jacksonville, FL - Racing
Jacksonville Municipal Stadium - Jacksonville, FL - Racing
Jacksonville Municipal Stadium - Jacksonville, FL - Racing

Video.summary: All the Monster Jam action from Nissan Stadium in Nashville, Tennessee.
Video.title: Nissan Stadium - Nashville, TN

Video.summary: Monster Jam's 2007 season kicks off with epic racing and freestyle action from Minneapolis, MN, on December 2, 2006.
Video.title: Metrodome - Minneapolis, MN

Video.summary: Coming to you from Vikings Country, all the freestyle action from Minneapolis, MN, on December 8, 2007!
Video.title: HHH Metrodome - Minneapolis, MN - Freestyle

Video.summary: Monster Jam heads South, where the Superdome opens its doors to the hottest Monster Trucks on the circuit.
Video.title: Superdome - New Orleans, LA - Racing

Video.summary: The Monster Jam fun continues with freestyle action from Cowboys Stadium, on February 25, 2012.
Video.title: Cowboys Stadium - Arlington, TX - Freestyle

Video.summary: Monster Jam's 2022 season continues with round 19 of the Stadium Championship Series, at Lumen Field, in Seattle, Wa.
Video.title: Lumen Field - Seattle, WA

Video.summary: Houston's Astrodome is the setting for tonight's racing competition between all of your favorite trucks and drivers during the 2001 season of Monster Jam!
Video.title: Astrodome - Houston, TX - Racing

Video.summary: Over 72,000 fans witnessed the historic freestyle action from the Pontiac Silverdome, on January 7, 2006.
Video.title: Silverdome - Pontiac, MI - Freestyle

Video.summary: Monster Jam blasts into the Silverdome with freestyle! It's the most extreme monster jam action you'll see anywhere!
Video.title: Silverdome - Pontiac, MI - Freestyle

Video.summary: All the freestyle action from EverBank Field, on February 26, 2011.
Video.title: EverBank Field - Jacksonville, FL - Freestyle

Video.summary: Don't miss epic freestyle action from Cowboys Stadium, on February 26, 2011.
Video.title: Cowboys Stadium - Arlington, TX - Freestyle

Video.summary: It's 2005 and it's showtime! Check out the racing action from Olympic Stadium, on October 30, 2004.
Video.title: Olympic Stadium - Montreal, Quebec - Racing

Video.summary: Stadium Championship Series East begins the road to World Finals XXIII at the Alamodome. Grave Digger’s Tyler Menninga begins defense of his series championship while Tristan England debuts the newest truck in the Monster Jam fleet, JCB Digatron. Max D’s Tom Meents kicks-off his final competitive season.
Video.title: Alamodome - San Antonio, TX

Video.summary: Catch up with Monster Jam's awesome racing and freestyle action from the Georgia Dome in March of 2017!
Video.title: Georgia Dome - Atlanta, GA

Video.summary: Don't miss exciting freestyle action from Everbank Field Stadium February 21, 2014
Video.title: Everbank Field - Jacksonville, FL - Freestyle

Video.summary: Arena in 30 returns to the Prudential Center in Newark, NJ for round 5.
Video.title: Prudential Center - Newark, NJ

Video.summary: Get ready for a WrestleMania-worthy beatdown as iconic wrestling-themed monster trucks lay the summer smackdown on the competition! Witness some of the most EPIC freestyles in Monster Jam history, featuring legendary machines like Goldberg, Madusa, New World Order, and the WCW Nitro Machine!
Video.title: Wrestling Freestyles Compilation

Video.summary: Monster Jam's biggest of the best compete at Metlife Stadium on East Rutherford, NJ.
Video.title: MetLife Stadium - East Rutherford, NJ

Video.summary: The Arena Championship Series West title is on the line as Earth Shaker’s Tristan England looks to clinch the series and earn an automatic bid to Monster Jam World Finals XXII when the action heats up from Broadmoor World Arena in Colorado Springs.
Video.title: Broadmoor World Arena - Colorado Springs, CO

Image.alt: Broadmoor World Arena - Colorado Springs, CO
Broadmoor World Arena - Colorado Springs, CO
Broadmoor World Arena - Colorado Springs, CO

Video.summary: Monster Jam in East Rutherford with racing, skills, and freestyle that the whole family will enjoy!
Video.title: MetLife Stadium - East Rutherford, NJ

Video.summary: It's Primetime in Tampa as Stadium Championship East continues for Round 9.
Video.title: Raymond James Stadium - Tampa, FL

Video.summary: Inglewood, CA is the next stop for Monster Jam Primetime with all the racing, skills, and freestyle action!
Video.title: Sofi Stadium - Inglewood, CA

Video.summary: Racing, skills, and freestyle action are in store during Monster Jam's stop in San Diego, CA.
Video.title: Snapdragon Stadium - San Diego, CA

Video.summary: Monster Jam's 2003 season comes to an end with World Finals 4. Don't miss the exciting racing action!
Video.title: World Finals IV - Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV - Racing
